children.name: Exposure Hot Spot Identification Protocol
children.description: A therapist micro-skill to identify, label, and flag high-arousal moments ('hot spots') within a trauma narrative during imaginal exposure for later targeted processing.
children.applicable_when: A therapist micro-skill to identify, label, and flag high-arousal moments ('hot spots') within a trauma narrative during imaginal exposure for later targeted processing.
selector_terms: Client pauses unusually long (>5 sec) during memory narration
Client displays acute somatic response (sweating, tearfulness, voice breaking) without prompting
SUDS spikes ≥30 points within one narrative clause
A therapist micro-skill to identify, label, and flag high-arousal moments ('hot spots') within a trauma narrative during imaginal exposure for later targeted processing.
children.relative_path: 心理咨询/Family技能/行为主义/微技能/Exposure Hot Spot Identification Protocol/SKILL.md

children.name: SUDS-Guided Exposure Pacing
children.description: A micro-intervention where the therapist uses real-time SUDS ratings to calibrate pacing, validate distress, and decide whether to continue, pause, or repeat segments of imaginal exposure.
children.applicable_when: A micro-intervention where the therapist uses real-time SUDS ratings to calibrate pacing, validate distress, and decide whether to continue, pause, or repeat segments of imaginal exposure.
selector_terms: Client provides a SUDS rating ≥70 mid-exposure
Client pauses or shows physiological arousal (sweating, tearfulness)
Therapist observes incongruence between reported SUDS and behavioral cues
physiological signs of arousal (tearfulness, sweating, shallow breathing)
narrative pause longer than 5 seconds without prompting
A micro-intervention where the therapist uses real-time SUDS ratings to calibrate pacing, validate distress, and decide whether to continue, pause, or repeat segments of imaginal exposure.
children.relative_path: 心理咨询/Family技能/行为主义/微技能/SUDS-Guided Exposure Pacing/SKILL.md
